columns.name: type
columns.description: to_others = user owes someone; from_others = someone owes user; habit = personal recurring commitment; calendar = scheduled event

columns.name: description
columns.description: Additional context or notes about the commitment

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: Reference to a row in the people table — who this commitment involves

columns.name: due_date
columns.description: When this commitment is due or scheduled (also the event date for calendar type)

columns.name: preferred_time
columns.description: HH:MM — start time for habits and calendar events

columns.name: end_time
columns.description: HH:MM — end time for calendar events

columns.name: recurrence
columns.description: For habits: how often this repeats

columns.name: status
columns.description: Current lifecycle state of this commitment

columns.name: external_ref
columns.description: Calendar event ID or other external reference

columns.name: notes
columns.description: Any extra context the user has added
